problems.diagnostic: Assignment statements are allowed only in component implementations
problems.cause: AGREE annex is in process type scope but contains implementation-level assign statements
problems.minimal_edit: Move the AGREE annex block from process type to process implementation

executor_steps: Remove the AGREE annex block from the doors_process component type
Add a new AGREE annex block to the doors_process.imp component implementation
Copy all assign statements from the removed annex to the new annex
